name: EMJ Builders
tagline: Santa Rosa custom homes, additions & remodels since 2005
seoDescription: EMJ Builders is a Santa Rosa general contractor for custom homes, additions, kitchen and bath remodels, and renovations across Sonoma, Marin, and Napa

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

sections.heading: About EMJ Builders
body: EMJ Builders is an owner-operated general contractor based in Santa Rosa, founded by Ethan Johnson in 2005. Ethan has spent more than 25 years in construction and has run EMJ Builders for nearly two decades, building a reputation across the North Bay for honest work and close attention to detail.

The team handles all phases of construction — from the foundation up to the finishing touches — including new custom homes, additions, kitchen and bath remodels, decks, and renovations large and small. They also take on insurance claim work, rebuilding homes after fire and flood damage. The goal on every project is simple: make sure the customer is completely satisfied when the job is done.

members.name: Ethan Johnson
members.bio: Ethan founded EMJ Builders in 2005 and has more than 25 years in the construction field. He prides himself on honesty and attention to detail, and personally stands behind the work on every job.
